mck_info.address2: 1st Floor to 8th Floor 141 Nguyen Du Street Ben Thanh Ward, District 1
mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Viet Dragon Securities Corporation, together with its subsidiary, Viet Dragon Asset Management Corporation, provides brokerage, securities trading, finance and investment advisory, underwriting, securities custodian, and derivatives services. The company operates through Proprietary Activities; Brokerage and Securities Services; Investment Banking; and Others segments. The company offers securities brokerages, securities investment advisory services, and margin custodian services; and corporate financial advisory, M&A consultancy, and other consultancy services. It also provides underlying securities, covered warrant, corporate bond, and fund certificate distribution services; financial services and other value-added services; and equity capital and debt capital market, merger and acquisition, and corporate finance advisory services, as well as online services. In addition, the company establishes and manages securities investment funds and securities investment companies; and manages securities portfolios. It serves individual, institutional, and corporate clients in Vietnam. Viet Dragon Securities Corporation was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
